# Test-only dependencies — NOT shipped with the IDS.
# Install: pip install -r env/requirements-dev.txt
#
# Why separate from requirements.txt:
#   - httpx is needed by fastapi.testclient (TestClient) for in-process
#     ASGI testing. Production code never imports it.
#   - pytest is for the smoke test scaffolding to be added in Week 4.

httpx>=0.27
pytest>=8.0
